title: ctenitis umbrina
intro: Ctenitis umbrina is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as a type of tropical tree fern. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ctenitis umbrina include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves are also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
